title: Myticly Optimized
description: This modpack is better then Fabulously Optimized.
body:
Well hello there I see you have stumbled onto my modpack page, well.
> **Disclaimer: This pack only works with modrinth client!**
# Modpack summary
This modpack is for performance mainly. There are also version forks as listed at the end of the description. The features of the General version of this modpack include aspects sutch as but not limited too: PvP huds, building holograms, optional bugfixes and utilities. This pack is almost infinitly customizable cince you can tweak all the setings to your liking. All this just so you can hop on your favorite servers without having to worry about your FPS!
## What does MO do?
- Optimizes the game **better** then FO (Fabulously Optimized)
- Adds a lot of customizability 
- 1600+ FPS on 25 render distance (my specs listed below)
- Good for PvP and other aspects of the game
  ![1600+ FPS singleplayer 25 chunks render distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bd2a37993a8bcb8ee2fc1714d64e5a4de0df7f9.png)
# Why i made MO
I made MO because i was tired of people saying FO was the best and that "you should just download FO its the best" stuff i find annoying. That's why i made this project, to be better then Fabulously Optimized
# What handy mods does it have? 
**(does depend on the version)**
- Mod Menu (configure other mods)
- Replay Mod (sick clips of your builds)
- Tweakeroo (for the nerds)
- Lightmatica (for the builders)
- Inventory Hud+ (PvP or other)
- Pop counter (PvP)
- Manny optimization mods for better performance
- And much more that is too much to list here
#   Standard settings
## What settings does it come with?
- 25 chunk render distance
- Performance mods best settings
- Minecraft settings for a balanced game that runs smoothly

### Sugestions form:
[Google form: Sugestions](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc-exnHSO9G4ZSWWH3lFkoKalX7ivUXG3zYHWmN3xrviQZYeg/viewform?usp=sharing)
**Please enjoy usage of my modpack, you can also add your own resource packs or shaders if you like using the standard process.**
## Mythicly Optimized ([version] V,P,B,G)
A letter after the the version, for example (1.3V 1.21.5) means that the modpack has a specific purpose.
- G = General
- GN = General Nothing (no utils)
- V = Vanity
- B = Building
- P = PvP
## My specs
> This is so you can get a reasonable understanding of what fps you will get on your system.
- GPU: 12x AMD Ryzen 5 5600X 5-Core Proessor
- Display: 2560 x 1417
- GPU: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT
